nodes.name: 史瓦帝尼
nodes.summary: 史瓦帝尼是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联89种鸟类，包括Shelley's francolin、Natal spurfowl、Swainson's spurfowl等89种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 奥兰治河

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 卡尔·林奈

nodes.name: Cape weaver
nodes.summary: Cape weaver（Cape weaver，学名 Ploceus capensis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联11个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括稀树草原。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Cape weaver (Ploceus capensis) is a species of bird in the weaver family, Ploceidae, found in southern Africa

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Cape weaver (Ploceus capensis) is a species of bird in the weaver family, Ploceidae, found in southern Africa

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Cape weaver is endemic to South Africa, Lesotho and Eswatini, occurring across much of the area excluding the Kalahari Desert from the Orange River in the Northern Cape south to the Cape of Good Hope then east to northern KwaZulu Natal and inland almost to Bloemfontein in the Free State. The Cape weaver occurs in open grassland, lowland fynbos, coastal thicket and farmland, so long as there is permanent water and trees. In the more arid, hotter regions it is restricted to upland areas and it never occurs in forest
